meta.title: AoD Podcast | Is War Today More Like Star Wars or Mad Max? (feat. Michael Doran)
meta.description:
Should the U.S. military be building an army that is technologically smart, small and hyper-effective, or should it be pumping out 20th century bullets, artillery and tanks in overwhelming numbers? In his new article "Battlefield: Star Wars vs. Mad Max," Hudson Senior Fellow Michael Doran argues that the wars in Ukraine and Gaza should demonstrate to Israel and the U.S. that contrary to popular opinion modern wars are just as slow, big and resource heavy as they've ever been. A hybrid Mad Max style industrial base will be needed to win modern wars. 

Read Michael Doran's Tablet piece with co-author Can Kasapoglu in Tablet: https://www.tabletmag.com/sections/israel-middle-east/articles/gates-of-gaza
